Public Statement Regarding Liron Shapira

After careful consideration, I've decided to publicly clarify my position regarding interactions with Liron Shapira, particularly our recent conversation.

Liron Shapira approached me repeatedly, requesting a debate. Initially, I was open to this idea, provided he engaged with my written works and offered an apology for his previous disrespectful remarks (including explicitly calling me a "coward" on his YouTube channel, as reported by multiple individuals).

In our most recent conversation, Liron repeatedly demonstrated behaviors consistent with evasion, manipulation, and goalpost-moving:

1. Denial and Backpedaling: Initially, he denied ever stating that humanity was "dead no matter what." When I confronted him with evidence (screenshots and multiple audience confirmations), he quickly shifted his stance, claiming he meant we were "likely doomed," aligning himself retroactively with probabilistic doom scenarios. This rapid pivoting constitutes explicit backpedaling when confronted with evidence.

2. Continuous Dodging of Simple Conditions: When explicitly asked if he would read my book (a common courtesy and a basic prerequisite for informed debate), he avoided committing clearly, introducing conditions such as insisting on an exchange of equal time. When asked directly about substantial contributions from his side (research, books, or code), he evaded specificity and referred me broadly to his YouTube channel instead.

3. Refusal to Apologize for Unprofessional Conduct: When directly confronted with his name-calling behavior (explicitly calling me a coward on his YouTube channel), he tacitly conceded to this but dismissed any responsibility, stating, "I don't see my behavior as inappropriate, so I will not apologize."

4. Manipulative Tactics and Attempts at Control: Liron repeatedly shifted the debate focus, suggesting alternative topics (such as analyzing a specific paper) rather than addressing my clear, initial conditions. This consistent behavior further confirmed my suspicion that he simply wanted to evade accountability.

Given these circumstances, and after consulting closely with my inner circle—who unanimously described Liron as a troll and a bully—I have decided to disengage completely. I maintain a zero-tolerance policy toward bullying, disrespect, and manipulative behavior.

Therefore, effective immediately, I have blocked Liron Shapira and will not entertain future interactions or debates with him. I firmly believe rewarding such conduct by providing a platform or my time would perpetuate toxic behavior, which I unequivocally refuse to support. Actions have consequences. 

I remain committed to productive and respectful discussions on AI alignment with anyone sincerely interested in meaningful dialogue.

PS, I do have the receipts but I won't stoop so low as to publicly post private chats. I am, however, done with this fool.

Late nights have me thinking about identity and AI lately. I've realized that just like some people develop a "beauty complex," I've had a lifelong "genius complex." My intelligence defined me - from impressing adults as a kid to building complex automation systems at Cisco. But now AI is sailing past human capabilities in coding, math, and everything I once prided myself on.

The hard truth? Our traditional sources of self-worth are becoming obsolete. What happens when we become nobody? When GPT-5 becomes smarter than even Sam Altman this year, what makes any of us special anymore? These questions keep me up at night, wrestling with a future that's arriving faster than most realize.

Yet in this upheaval, I'm finding peace in simple moments - breakfast with my wife, watching our dogs play at the park, capturing the beauty of a river in fall. AI might overtake our skills, but it can't take away these pure human experiences. Maybe becoming nobody isn't my worst nightmare after all. Maybe it's liberation.

The AI system making headlines today is Composer 2, a newly launched coding model by the San Francisco-based AI startup Cursor.

Here is a breakdown of what happened:

The Accidental Output: Shortly after Cursor launched Composer 2—marketing it as a proprietary, "frontier-level" coding model—a developer inspecting the platform's API responses discovered a hidden internal model ID string that read kimi-k2p5-rl-0317-s515-fast.

The Chinese Origin: That string revealed that Composer 2 was secretly built on top of Kimi K2.5, an open-source model developed by Moonshot AI (a prominent Chinese AI startup backed by Alibaba and Tencent).

The Admission: Following the exposure on X (formerly Twitter) and Reddit, Cursor's leadership publicly confirmed the discovery. Co-founder Aman Sanger admitted it was a "miss" not to disclose the Kimi foundation in their initial launch announcement.

The Defense: Cursor clarified that while Kimi K2.5 served as the base, only about 25% of the final model's computing power came from it. The remaining 75% was dedicated to Cursor's own rigorous reinforcement learning and fine-tuning specifically for coding tasks. Moonshot AI also weighed in, confirming that Cursor's commercial use of the model was fully authorized through a partnership with the inference platform Fireworks AI.

The incident has sparked heavy debate in the tech community regarding transparency and the heavy reliance of Western AI startups on Chinese open-source models.

Kali Ma is a major goddess in Hinduism, primarily associated with time, death, and destruction.

Kali is also connected with transcendental knowledge and is one of a number of goddesses who provide liberating knowledge.

She is chiefly worshipped as the Divine Mother, Mother of the Universe, and Divine feminine energy.

The origins of Kali can be traced to the pre-Vedic and Vedic era goddess worship traditions in the Indian subcontinent.

Kali appears in many stories, with the most popular one being when she manifests as personification of goddess Durga to defeat a demon.

Her appearance can be purposefully shocking, as she comes to disrupt and destroy what needs to be disrupted and destroyed at a personal and planetary level.

Rough love is certainly her way to help you discover your wisdom and your power.
